'''Reme Pollar''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who joined [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] following the death of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] at the [[Battle of Bilbringi (9 ABY)|Battle of Bilbringi]].

Pollar flew with the Rogues during the [[Invids]] investigation, flying during a skirmish near [[K'vath 5]]. During the skirmish with the pirates, she went EV.

{{Char-stub}}
